name: Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Sift together flour, 1/2 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Add oil, egg yolks, water, and vanilla to the well.
4. Beat at high speed of an electric mixer for about 5 minutes or until satiny smooth.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites and cream of tartar until soft peaks form.
6. Gradually add remaining 1/2 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, to the egg whites and beat until stiff peaks form.
7. Pour the egg yolk mixture into the egg whites in a thin, steady stream.
8. Gently fold the whites into the yolk mixture.
9. Pour batter into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan, spreading evenly with a spatula.
10. Bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
11. Invert the pan and cool for 40 minutes.
12. Loosen the cake from the sides of the pan using a narrow metal spatula.
13. Remove the cake from the pan.
Yield: one 10-inch cake.
